docx_references.name: Cyber Security Analysis
docx_references.description:
Cyber Security Analysis
Public Tableau dashboard with cyber-incident analysis by industry. Useful as an executive cyber-posture analog.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/sinamandla.mabaso/viz/CyberSecurityAnalysis_16915038943080/Dashboard1

docx_references.name: CVE Vulnerability Checker
docx_references.description:
CVE Vulnerability Checker
Public Tableau dashboard oriented around CVE and vulnerability-triage style analysis. Closest public analog to vulnerability-management reporting.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/kpmg.forensics/viz/CVEVulnerabilityChecker/CVEVulnerabilityChecker

docx_references.name: Cyber/Security Interactive Dashboard
docx_references.description:
Cyber/Security Interactive Dashboard
Older public Tableau cyber dashboard. More useful as layout and storytelling inspiration than as a current operating model.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/econleadership/viz/CyberSecurityDashboard/CyberBETA

docx_references.name: Vulnerability Assessment Dashboard 2023
docx_references.description:
Vulnerability Assessment Dashboard 2023
Another public vulnerability-themed Tableau example. Availability may vary, but it is indexed publicly.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/family.legacy/viz/VulnerabilityAssessmentDashboard2023/VulnerabilityAssessment2023Dashboard

docx_references.name: Risk Register (Tableau Exchange accelerator)
docx_references.description:
Risk Register (Tableau Exchange accelerator)
Official Tableau accelerator for risk tracking, prioritization, mitigation, and exposure monitoring. Strong fit for adapting into a CISO posture dashboard.
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/594

docx_references.name: PMO Project Management Dashboard
docx_references.description:
PMO Project Management Dashboard
Public Tableau dashboard with portfolio status, project progress, budget consumption, and project-manager workload views.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/ervin.vinzon/viz/PMOProjectManagementDashboard/PMOProjectManagementDashboard

docx_references.name: PMO - Project Management Dashboard #RWFD #Exchange
docx_references.description:
PMO - Project Management Dashboard #RWFD #Exchange
Public PMO dashboard focused on executive summary views. Good reference for PMO layout patterns.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/ajay.varghese/viz/PMO-ProjectManagementDashboardRWFDExchange/MainDashboard

docx_references.name: Project Management Action Dashboard
docx_references.description:
Project Management Action Dashboard
Public Tableau dashboard focused on operational PM actions and status tracking.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/b.winsey/viz/ProjectManagementActionDashboard/PMDashboard

docx_references.name: Project Management Dashboard
docx_references.description:
Project Management Dashboard
Public Tableau project-management redesign example. Good for summary and status framing.
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/gandes.goldestan/viz/Projectmanagementoffice/Overview

docx_references.name: PMO - Project Portfolio
docx_references.description:
PMO - Project Portfolio
Public Tableau view aligned to project portfolio oversight, including priority, risk, budget, and progress.
https://public.tableau.com/views/ProjectManagement-PMODashboard/Home

docx_references.name: Project Portfolio (Tableau Exchange accelerator)
docx_references.description:
Project Portfolio (Tableau Exchange accelerator)
Official Tableau accelerator for project portfolio evaluation, budget consumption, progress tracking, and project risk identification.
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/582

docx_references.name: Jira (Tableau Exchange connector)
docx_references.description:
Jira (Tableau Exchange connector)
Official Tableau Exchange connector for Jira. Relevant for pulling issues, stories, tasks, and related project data into Tableau.
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/1089

docx_references.name: Tableau Accelerators overview
docx_references.description:
Tableau Accelerators overview
Official Tableau page for accelerators. Useful starting point for finding adjacent templates.
https://www.tableau.com/solutions/exchange/accelerators

docx_references.name: Tableau Exchange connectors
docx_references.description:
Tableau Exchange connectors
Official Tableau Exchange connectors directory. Useful for identifying supported integration paths beyond Jira.
https://exchange.tableau.com/connectors

docx_references.name: REST API Connector (Tableau Exchange)
docx_references.description:
REST API Connector (Tableau Exchange)
Official Tableau Exchange connector for REST APIs. Potential fallback if a target system is not covered by a native connector.
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/1111

docx_references.name: Closest CISO / vulnerability posture analog: CVE Vulnerability Checker
docx_references.description:
Closest CISO / vulnerability posture analog: CVE Vulnerability Checker
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/kpmg.forensics/viz/CVEVulnerabilityChecker/CVEVulnerabilityChecker

docx_references.name: Best official CISO-ish starting point: Risk Register
docx_references.description:
Best official CISO-ish starting point: Risk Register
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/594

docx_references.name: Closest PM / executive portfolio analog: PMO Project Management Dashboard
docx_references.description:
Closest PM / executive portfolio analog: PMO Project Management Dashboard
https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/ervin.vinzon/viz/PMOProjectManagementDashboard/PMOProjectManagementDashboard

docx_references.name: Best official PM / Jira starting point: Project Portfolio + Jira connector
docx_references.description:
Best official PM / Jira starting point: Project Portfolio + Jira connector
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/582
https://exchange.tableau.com/products/1089

docx_references.name: Public dashboards that clearly expose live Tenable or live Jira backends are rare in Tableau Public
docx_references.description: Public dashboards that clearly expose live Tenable or live Jira backends are rare in Tableau Public. Most public examples are demos, redesigns, or dashboards built on public or synthetic data.

docx_references.name: The strongest practical pattern is usually: start from an official Tableau accelerator, then wire it to enterprise data through a connector such as Jira or a REST/API path
docx_references.description: The strongest practical pattern is usually: start from an official Tableau accelerator, then wire it to enterprise data through a connector such as Jira or a REST/API path.
